title: Pumpkin Madness
description:
One new biome, "Pumpkin Grove", which contains secrets, but what are they?
So figure this out, I won't give you any hints, but this biome will make you come back again! )
body:
# Adds
This mod adds a new biome and also a couple of very funny entities that will appear in a later version of the mod. Crafts and achievements will also be attached to the mod. 
## Will not be added
There will be no book about the mod. There will be no guide to the mod! I want you to dive into its study and find out what else it adds.
### "Not the most important thing"
This is my first mod! Honestly, I'm not very good at this, but I'd appreciate criticism!
## Need
Unfortunately, I'm not a pro at creating mods! So I'll be glad if you want to help or suggest ideas.
### Offer
If you want to create and publish mods with me, you can join the team. Everything happens in Discord!
